title: sanjaysgk/ipg MS search samplesheet schema
description: Schema for the MS search samplesheet (--ms_input)

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

ms_file.errorMessage: Path to MS data file (.raw, .mzML, or .d directory)

condition.errorMessage: Optional condition label for FlashLFQ grouping

fraction.errorMessage: Optional 1-based fraction index for fractionated LC-MS (pre-fractionated pool number). Defaults to 1.

replicate.errorMessage: Optional replicate label (e.g. rep1, rep2). Useful when one sample has multiple biological replicates.
